journal_red_flags: Purely theoretical derivations or network science proposals without empirical validation on standard video/image benchmarks
Evaluations limited to a single dataset without cross-task generalization or missing standard quantitative metrics (e.g., PSNR, SSIM, BD-rate)
Lack of direct quantitative comparison with recent state-of-the-art baselines
Methodology sections lacking clear system architectures, mathematical formulation, or algorithmic pseudocode
Superficial experimental setups that omit critical implementation details, training/testing splits, or hyperparameters
